courses.title: Complete Python Programming: From Beginner to Advanced
courses.subtitle: Master Python programming with hands-on projects, algorithms, data structures, and real-world applications

instructor.name: Jane Doe
instructor.title: Senior Full Stack Developer & Instructor
instructor.bio: Jane Doe is a seasoned full-stack developer with over 12 years of experience in building scalable web applications using various technology stacks. She has mentored thousands of students worldwide.

sections.title: Backend Development with Node.js and Express
Database Integration with MongoDB and MySQL

whatYouWillLearn: Develop full-stack web applications using MERN, MEAN, and LAMP stacks
Implement RESTful APIs and integrate with frontend frameworks
Manage databases using MongoDB and MySQL
Deploy applications to cloud platforms
Understand the fundamentals of web security and authentication
Optimize applications for performance and scalability
requirements: Basic understanding of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript
A computer with internet access
Willingness to learn and build projects
courses.description: This comprehensive Python course takes you from absolute beginner to advanced programmer through hands-on projects, coding exercises, and real-world applications. You'll learn Python from the ground up and gain the skills needed to build professional applications.Whether you're looking to start a career in programming, automate tasks, analyze data, or build web applications, this course provides the perfect foundation in Python programming.The course is constantly updated with new content, projects, and resources based on student feedback and the latest developments in Python.

courses.title: Complete Python Programming: From Beginner to Advanced
courses.subtitle: Master Python programming with hands-on projects, algorithms, data structures, and real-world applications

instructor.name: Dr. Sarah Johnson
instructor.title: Senior Software Engineer & Python Expert
instructor.bio: Ph.D. in Computer Science with 15+ years of industry experience. Taught Python to over 500,000 students worldwide.

whatYouWillLearn: Build 5 real-world Python applications from scratch
Master Python programming fundamentals and advanced concepts
Work with databases, APIs, and web frameworks
Implement data structures and algorithms in Python
Create GUI applications with Tkinter
Understand object-oriented programming principles
Develop automation scripts and tools
Prepare for Python developer interviews
requirements: No prior programming experience required - we'll start from the basics
Basic computer skills (file management, internet browsing)
A computer with Windows, Mac, or Linux

You'll learn Python from the ground up and gain the skills needed to build professional applications.Whether you're looking to start a career in programming, automate tasks, analyze data, or build web applications, this course provides the perfect foundation in Python programming.The course is constantly updated with new content, projects, and resources based on student feedback and the latest developments in Python.
